case_title: PHILIP MA VS. CHARLES RUSSELL STOTT

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MA, PHILIP STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MA, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MA, PHILIP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PHILIP MA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS #301183. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL HEARING SET FOR JUL-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $120.00) SERVED MAR-18-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL

RETURNED MAIL: REJECT NOTICE RE FILING OF APPEAL MAILED ON 5/25/18 TO STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY IN C/O OAKLAND SERVICE OF PROCESS, INC. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT, STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL MAILED TO RESPONDENT MA, PHILLIP. ($75.00 FILING FEE VOIDED)
THE APPEAL FILED ON MAY 25, 2018 WAS FILED IN ERROR. PAYMENT VOIDED THIS DATE AND ALL DOCUMENTS RETURNED TO FILER.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT - 2ND REQUEST FOR MOTION TO VACATE - FILED BY DEFENDANT STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL HEARING SET FOR AUG-15-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CHARLES RUSSELL STOTT ON AUG-15-2018 - DENIED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR PHILLIP MA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER BENJAMIN GIANG #192775. JUDGMENT DEBTOR CHARLES STOTT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, PHILIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,495.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-03-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). JUDGMENT CREDITOR PHILLIP MA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED PROVISIONAL CANTONESE INTERPETER REBECCA CHAU. JUDGMENT DEBTOR CHARLES RUSSELL STOTT IS NOT PRESENT. MOVING PARTY FOR MOTION TO VACATE DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STOTT, CHARLES RUSSELL
